channel.title: The Guardian - Football
channel.description: Latest football news from the Guardian

item.title: FIFA confirms Mexico City to open World Cup 2026
item.description: The opening match of FIFA World Cup 2026 will be staged at the Estadio Azteca in Mexico City.
item.dc:creator: Guardian sport staff

item.title: France name 30-man squad for friendlies
item.description: Didier Deschamps has named a 30-man squad ahead of two friendlies in the build-up to the World Cup.
